title: Notifications
subtitle: Events requiring your attention across needs, resources, campaigns, profile completion, and Topes transfers.

confirmDialog.title: Mark all notifications as read?
confirmDialog.body: This will set all unread notifications as read.

events.claimCreated: You got a claim for your need {{needName}}
events.resourceBidCreated: You got a bid for your resource {{resourceName}}
events.resourceBidExpiringSoon: A bid you received is about to expire
events.campaignAirdropComingSoon: The airdrop of campaign {{campaignName}} is coming soon!
events.campaignAirdropDone: Airdrop done on campaign {{campaignName}}! Check your contribution page to see if you got it
events.welcomeProfileReward: Welcome to tope-la, make a polished profile, and earn some Topes!
events.claimSettled: Congratulations, your claim on {{needName}} has been settled
events.resourceBidAccepted: Congratulations, your bid on {{resourceName}} has been accepted
events.resourceBidDeclined: Your bid on {{resourceName}} has been rejected
events.resourceBidCancelled: Your bid on {{resourceName}} has been cancelled
events.resourceBidExpired: Your bid on {{resourceName}} has expired without a response
